verses.text: Pilna a deihte, kithuhilh ding ut uh a, kitai ding utlohna pen haina ahi hi
Mihoihte in Topa' maipha ngah a, siatna a gamtate amah in a mawhsak hi
Gitlohna in lungmuan'na piangsaklo a, thuman mite lungmuang takin om uh hi
Zi hoih pen a pasal' minthan'na leh lungdamna hi a, a pasal a maizumsak zi pen a pasal-a' dingin a dam theilo guhnatna tawh kibang hi
Thuman mite in a kilawm a kituakin hong bawl a, migilote bek in hong khem nuam hi
Migilote' thugente mi thahnopna bekbek hi a, midikte' thugente in lauhuaina sunga om mite a honkhia hi
Migilote in sihna tuakin cimang a, thuman mite nungta-in khang kizom hi
Mipilte kiphatin kipahtawi a, mihaite kineu-et hi
Nektawm ding neilopi-in milian bangin omna sangin nuntakna ding na semin mi mawkmawk hihna hoihzaw hi
Midikte in a gannote hoihtakin don a, migilote in a gannote bawlsia hi
Nakpi takin lo khote in an hau a, man neilopi-in hun beisakna in haina ahi hi
Migilote' belh munmuan'huai pen leikhal bangin kitamzan a, mihoihte' zung kip tawntung hi
Migilote in a zuaugenna uh awkpih a, thuman mite buaina tawh kipelh hi
Mite in kam hoih pauna hangin thaman ngah uh a, a sepna bangun zong thaman ngah uh hi
Mihaite pen amau mah thuman kisa tawntung a, mipilte in mi' thugenna ngai nuam uh hi
Mihaite in a hehna uh langsakpah uh a, mipilte in a hehna uh ipzo hi
Thuman mite in thu taktak mah gen uh a, zuau tecite in khemna thu bek gen uh hi
Ngaihsun lo-a kampauna in tem hiam bangin mi liamsak thei a, mipilte' kampauna in tua bang liamna damsak thei hi
Thuman genna kip tawntung a, thuzuau genna tomno sung bek kimang hi
Thusia ngaihsunte lungkham uh a, thuhoih vaihawmte lungdam uh hi
Thuman mite tungah thusia tunglo a, migilote lungkhamna tawh kidim hi
Topa in zuaugen mite mudah a, mi citakte tungah a lungdam hi
Mipilte in a theihna uh im khinkhian a, mihaite in a haina uh pholaklak hi
Mi thanuamte vanglian a, mi thadahte sila suak hi
Lunghihmawhna in lungkhamna piangsak a, kampau hoih in mi lungdamsak hi
Midikte in a gamtatna uh tel et a, migilote a gamtatna un lam pialsak hi
Thadahte a tup tung ngeilo a, a thanuamte in a deih ngah hi
Mi thumante' gamtatna in nuntakna piangsak a, mihaite' gamtatna in sihna piangsak hi.
